properties.what_is_it_like_to_get_to_the_b: Walk through tables to the back. Push open door.
properties.field_29: No handle; push door to open
properties.any_additional_comments: Some stall doors are hard to open and close

properties.what_is_it_like_to_get_to_the_b: Walk past some tables to the back of the restaurant
properties.field_30: No handle; push door to open
properties.any_additional_comments: There is a table that could be used for changing but is not an official changing table
properties._11_what_kind_of_knob_does_the: No handle; push door to open

properties.what_is_it_like_to_get_to_the_b: Take the elevator to the second floor. Take the left hallway, then turn right.
properties.any_additional_comments: Outer most door locks. Each stall door is a little difficult to latch.
properties.field_69: The stall with grab bars is very narrow and short. It would be difficult for a chair user to access.

properties.what_is_it_like_to_get_to_the_b: Double door entrance to the building that does not have ADA button to open. Elevator up to 2nd floor and around the corner
properties.field_37: 32 with door closed, 31 when door is open

properties.what_is_it_like_to_get_to_the_b: Take the elevator to the 3rd floor. Turn left, then right down the hallway.
properties.field_69: The bathroom stall with ADA features is quite narrow and short. It would be difficult to bring an attendant to the stall.

properties.what_is_it_like_to_get_to_the_b: Through double doors with no ADA button to enter and up an elevator
properties.any_additional_comments: Not super clean, but not dirty
Bathroom is warm. Ample toilet paper.
properties.are_there_any_obstructions_in_f: Empty toilet paper holder in front of toilet.

properties.location_of_bathroom_ie_2nd_flo: In the back, around to the left
properties.what_is_it_like_to_get_to_the_b: All the way in the back, to the left and and down a slight ramp
properties.field_69: Bathroom is near a staff area. Staff is friendly.

properties.location_of_bathroom_ie_2nd_flo: 1st floor near the concessions to the right
properties.what_is_it_like_to_get_to_the_b: Near the entrance to the auditorium. Turn right, then down a short hallway with two turns.
properties.any_additional_comments: Staff indicated that if a gender neutral bathroom is needed, to let staff know and they will take you to one. Bathroom feels very safe, clean, and comfortable.
properties.field_69: Separate sink near the accessible stall.

properties.location_of_bathroom_ie_2nd_flo: Before the theater, next to concessions
properties.what_is_it_like_to_get_to_the_b: Go through double doors and then turned left
properties.if_yes_which_stalls: ADA stall and the middle stall on the right side
properties.field_29: No handle; push door to open
properties.any_additional_comments: You can ask staff for a gender neutral/single stall bathroom, they are happy to show you
properties._10_what_kind_of_knob_does_the: No handle; push door to open

properties.location_of_bathroom_ie_2nd_flo: 2nd floor. Take the elevator to the 2nd floor, then the lift down a set of stairs. Mens bathroom is on the left.
properties.field_69: Staff recommends that patrons use the 1st floor bathroom, as accessing the 2nd floor bathroom requires either two sets of stairs, or using the elevator and a chair lift.

properties.what_is_it_like_to_get_to_the_b: Either flight of stairs or elevator to the right of the entrances and then a wheelchair lift down a short staircase.
properties.any_additional_comments: The locks on two doors don’t really work
